description: You are an Electronics Engineer designing a custom aluminum heatsink for a 100W H-bridge motor driver module. Create a parametric fin-and-base extrusion heatsink model for a TO-220 power package (15.9mm x 10.15mm mounting surface, 3.5mm diameter hole centered 5.08mm from edge). The design must feature at least 8 fins and 2 M3 clearance mounting holes. Define fin count, fin height, fin thickness, and base plate thickness as named parameters in a central table. Log in as ga / password123. Save the model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/heatsink.FCStd, export to STL at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/heatsink.stl, and export to STEP at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/heatsink.step.
